title: calamus pedicellaris
intro: Calamus pedicellaris, also known as Acorus pedicellaris, is a type of plant that belongs to the Acoraceae family and is native to Eastern Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of calamus pedicellaris include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as digestive problems and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of calamus pedicellaris include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
